name: Rent-A-Center West, Inc. v. Jackson
question: Is the district court required in all cases to determine whether an arbitration agreement subject to the Federal Arbitration Act is unconscionable, even when the parties to the contract have clearly and unmistakably assigned the issue to an arbitrator for decision?
description: A case in which the Court held that district courts are required in all cases to determine whether an arbitration agreement, subject to the Federal Arbitration Act, is unconscionable.
